articles.title: Noah Kahan joins Fenway Music Hall of Fame after historic four-night run
articles.description:
The Vermont-based singer-songwriter joins the likes of Billy Joel, Paul McCartney, and the Zac Brown Band as a Hall of Famer.

The post Noah Kahan joins Fenway Music Hall of Fame after historic four-night run appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Noah Kahan inducted into Fenway Music Hall of Fame on July 12, 2026.
Kahan's four-night concert series drew significant local attendance and support.
His recognition highlights Boston's vibrant music scene and boosts local culture.
